cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 太祖–成宗
cover.subtitle:
다섯 왕이 세운 나라,
경국대전으로 닫혔다.
cover.imagePrompt: Early Joseon dynasty illustration, 15th century. ONE Korean king (King Sejong) in deep crimson royal robe seated cross-legged at a low writing desk in Jiphyeonjeon hall interior. On the desk: Hangul-style script blocks suggested as abstract shapes (no actual letters), a brush, an inkstone. Behind him a folding screen with mountain ink-painting. Soft amber lamp light. Composition: scholarly authority, calm focus. Color: deep crimson + navy + ink-black + hanji beige. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 태조 한양 천도. 정도전 재상 중심 정치.
세조 즉위. 6조 직계제 부활, 직전법 시행.

outro.tip_headline:
"태종·세조 직계제 / 세종·성종 서사제"
왕과 체제를 묶어라.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 6조 직계제(태종·세조)와 의정부 서사제(세종·성종)를 왕별로 짝지어 묻는다. 계유정난(1453), 집현전 폐지(세조), 홍문관 설치(성종)도 빈출 포인트.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical law book icon (Gyeongguk-daejeon) shown from a slight angle, blank pages. RIGHT: a small royal crown silhouette suggesting kingship. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B91C1C accent + amber #C77B3D detail. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
